docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-18-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RIVERA, ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT REED, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVERA, ANTONIO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 100.00 SERVED AUG-01-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REED, MICHAEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVERA, ANTONIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REED, MICHAEL THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT THE RENTAL UNIT OCCUPIED BY PLAINTIFF IS UNTENANTABLE WITHIN THE MEANING OF CIVIL CODE SECTION 1941-1941.1. THE EVIDENCE SUPPORTS THAT THE DEFENDANT LANDLORD MADE PROMPT REPAIRS OF DEFECTIVE CONDITIONS WITHIN THE RENTAL UNIT OF WHICH HE HAD NOTICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2017 - JUDGMENT.
